学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a key national university under the 211 Project and is also included in the Double First-Class construction list. 专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, medical majors have remained highly popular nationwide, with fierce competition in clinical medicine, pharmacy, and other fields. 预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical category in 2026 is expected to be around 50,516, slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases), with a fluctuation range of 50,263 to 50,769.
